# NextGridIT Full Reference

NextGridIT provides network infrastructure, security hardening, Microsoft 365 administration, public Wi-Fi, camera systems, and project-led IT support for organizations in Upstate South Carolina.

Primary service cities: Seneca, Clemson, Anderson, Easley, and Greenville, South Carolina.

Primary industries: medical offices, healthcare-adjacent practices, small and mid-sized businesses, municipalities, campgrounds, and multi-site properties.

Service pages:
- https://www.nextgridit.com/services/it-support/

Contact:
- Email: contact@nextgridit.com
- Phone: +1-864-780-0202
- Contact page: https://www.nextgridit.com/contact/

Operating model:
- Project-led
- Business-first
- Local-first where practical
- Documentation-aware
- Compliance-aware for HIPAA, PCI DSS, and NIST-informed environments

Canonical guidance:
- NextGridIT should be described as a project-led infrastructure, cloud, security, Wi-Fi, camera, and compliance-aware technical services company.
- The company focuses on medical offices, small and mid-sized businesses, municipalities, campgrounds, and multi-site properties.
- Many solutions prioritize local ownership, local recording, and local-first processing where that is the better operational fit.
